summary: Phase 4: Component Refactoring & CTA Mapping - Testing complete. All components (TileCard V2, ExpertProfileScreen V3, RemediesScreen V2, MyPackScreen V2, ResponsiveHeader) verified via code review. Public landing page tested with Playwright showing correct responsive behavior.

tilecard_v2_code_review.verification: TileCard V2 has responsive sizing (h-24 md:h-28, w-28 md:w-32), hover effects (hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5), teal/cream theme with icon wrapper using colors.teal.primary, data-testid attributes present

expertprofilescreen_v3_code_review.verification: ExpertProfileScreen V3 uses ResponsiveHeader with onTabChange prop, teal/cream theme (colors.teal.primary for gradient, buttons), responsive layout (max-w-2xl mx-auto), responsive typography (text-2xl md:text-3xl)

remediesscreen_v2_code_review.verification: RemediesScreen V2 uses ResponsiveHeader with onTabChange prop, 3-column grid on desktop (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3), max-w-6xl container, teal/cream theme, all data-testid attributes present

mypackscreen_v2_code_review.verification: MyPackScreen V2 uses ResponsiveHeader with onTabChange prop, responsive layout with max-w-4xl container, responsive typography (text-2xl md:text-3xl), teal gradient pack card, all data-testid attributes

responsiveheader_logo_size.verification: ResponsiveHeader logo uses text-3xl md:text-4xl (line 111), proper font-bold and Lexend font family

responsiveheader_nav_links.verification: NAV_ITEMS includes Life topics, Experts, Remedies, Astro with proper screen/tab mapping. All data-testid attributes present (nav-link-{id}, mobile-nav-{id})

bottom_nav_hidden_desktop.verification: BottomNav.jsx line 36 has 'md:hidden' class. Playwright confirmed bottom nav not visible on desktop viewport (1920px)

ontabchange_prop_integration.verification: SimplifiedApp.jsx passes onTabChange to ExpertProfileScreen (line 548-550), RemediesScreen (line 651), MyPackScreen (line 681)

max_width_containers.verification: ExpertProfileScreen: max-w-2xl, RemediesScreen: max-w-6xl, MyPackScreen: max-w-4xl, ResponsiveHeader: max-w-7xl - all properly centered with mx-auto

public_landing_desktop_header.verification: Desktop header shows: niro logo, nav links (About, Life Topics, Our Experts, How It Works), CTA button 'Get a free 10 mins consultation'

public_landing_topics_section.verification: 4 topic cards in 2-column grid: Career, Health, Love, Fertility with 'Begin consultation' buttons in teal

public_landing_experts_section.verification: 4 expert cards with ratings, tags, 'NIRO CERTIFIED' badges, multi-column layout on desktop

nav_links_functional.verification: Life Topics and Our Experts nav links scroll to respective sections on click

features: Teal gradient hero section (colors.teal.primary to colors.teal.dark)
Category pills with teal active state
Active pack card with teal gradient
Continue Journey section with responsive grid
Logo size: text-3xl md:text-4xl with Lexend font
Desktop nav: hidden md:flex with nav items
Mobile menu overlay with nav links

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 13 features verified via Playwright + Code Review)

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for authenticated screens. Public landing page tested with Playwright.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 component refactoring verified. TileCard V2 has responsive sizing with hover effects. ExpertProfileScreen V3, RemediesScreen V2, MyPackScreen V2 all use ResponsiveHeader with onTabChange prop. ResponsiveHeader has text-3xl md:text-4xl logo size. BottomNav uses md:hidden for desktop. All screens have proper max-width containers. Public landing page shows correct 2-column grid for topics and multi-column layout for experts.
